kontext.name: FLUX Kontext (best quality)
kontext.description: State-of-the-art editing via FLUX.1 Kontext. Q4 GGUF quantized, ~7GB. First use downloads model.

nunchaku.name: Nunchaku Kontext (fast INT4)
nunchaku.description: FLUX.1 Kontext with SVDQuant INT4. Real 4-bit compute — ~3-7× faster than GGUF. ~7GB download.

cosxl.name: CosXL Edit (SDXL quality)
cosxl.description: SDXL-based instruction editing. Good quality, faster than Kontext. ~6.5GB.
